title: Live Updates: Mideast Hostilities Flare, Testing Fragile U.S.-Iran Truce
summary_full: Bahrain said it had come under attack by Iranian drones, an apparent retaliation after the United States launched strikes on Iranian military sites overnight.
summary_public: Bahrain said it had come under attack by Iranian drones, an apparent retaliation after the United States launched strikes on Iranian military sites overnight.
